description: Schema-validated freeze manifest for a governed rescue task data lane.

required_fields.name: contract_path
required_fields.description: Repo-relative path to the rescue task contract artifact.

required_fields.name: governance_status
required_fields.description: Whether the freeze manifest is an example, planned, or active artifact.

required_fields.name: freeze_scope
required_fields.description: Whether the freeze covers only ranking inputs or the full task bundle.

required_fields.name: cutoff_date
required_fields.description: Rescue cutoff date that separates ranking inputs from held-out outcomes.

required_fields.name: frozen_at
required_fields.description: Date when the governed freeze was assembled.

required_fields.name: leakage_boundary_policy_id
required_fields.description: Leakage policy enforced by the rescue task contract.

required_fields.name: current_head_policy
required_fields.description: Current-head state policy enforced for rescue freezes.

required_fields.name: source_snapshots
required_fields.description: Raw upstream snapshots used to build the governed freeze.

required_fields.name: frozen_datasets
required_fields.description: Frozen datasets emitted by the governed rescue freeze.

required_fields.name: description
required_fields.description: Short governance summary for the rescue freeze.
